title: VonHaus 2-Step Stool – Anti Slip Feet – Easy to Store Foldable Design – Ideal for Home/Kitchen/Garage
features: COMPLETE DIY JOBS ANYWHERE: With a convenient carry handle for completing decorating and cleaning jobs around your home and garden, reach even the trickiest corners with the portable VonHaus 2 step folding stool.

SPACE SAVING STORAGE: With a slim depth of just 4.5cm when folded (H44.5 x W49.5 x D48.5cm when open), your caravan steps take up little room when not in use, making them perfect for slim drawers and narrow spaces.
RELIABLY ROBUST: Constructed from durable steel, your sturdy fold up step has a generous max weight capacity of 150kg so you can confidently complete your household DIY jobs to the best level.
SAFE STEPPING: From the anti-slip feet to the grooved surface and the hinged lock, your mechanics stool boasts stability to prevent slippages and let you work with certainty.
OUR BRAND PROMISE: Established in 2009, VonHaus is the helping hand you need to craft your dream home, inside and out. Bring your next DIY project into reach with our Fold up Step.
